1	name: SDK E2E Tests
2	
3	on:
4	  push:
5	    branches: [main]
6	    paths-ignore:
7	      - "ui/**"
8	  pull_request:
9	    paths-ignore:
10	      - "ui/**"
11	
12	permissions:
13	  contents: read
14	
15	env:
16	  GOCOVERDIR: "coverage"
17	
18	jobs:
19	  ts:
20	    name: "TS SDK / OS: (${{ matrix.os }}), key-queues: ${{ matrix.experimentalKeyQueues }}"
21	    strategy:
22	      fail-fast: false
23	      matrix:
24	        os: [ubuntu-latest]
25	        experimentalKeyQueues: [false, true]
26	    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
27	    steps:
28	      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
29	        with:
30	          submodules: true
31	
32	      - name: Set up Go
33	        uses: actions/setup-go@v5
34	        with:
35	          go-version-file: ./go.mod
36	
37	      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
38	        with:
39	          node-version: "20"
40	
41	      - name: Install pnpm
42	        uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
43	        with:
44	          version: 10.18.2
45	
46	      - name: Build UI
47	        run: make build-ui
48	
49	      - name: Build dev serve
50	        run: |
51	          go build -cover -o ./inngest-bin ./cmd
52	
53	      - name: Run E2E tests
54	        run: |
55	          cd ./tests/js
56	          pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
57	          pnpm dev &
58	          sleep 5
59	          cd ../../
60	          echo "Running dev server"
61	          mkdir $GOCOVERDIR
62	          nohup ./inngest-bin dev --no-discovery 2> /tmp/devserver-logs-kq-${{ matrix.experimentalKeyQueues }}-api.txt &
63	          echo "Ran dev server"
64	          sleep 5
65	          curl http://127.0.0.1:8288/dev > /dev/null 2> /dev/null
66	          go test ./tests -v
67	        env:
68	          INNGEST_SIGNING_KEY: test
69	          API_URL: http://127.0.0.1:8288
70	          SDK_URL: http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/inngest
71	          TEST_MODE: true
72	          EXPERIMENTAL_KEY_QUEUES_ENABLE: "${{ matrix.experimentalKeyQueues }}"
73	          LOG_LEVEL: trace
74	
75	      - name: Convert coverage for tooling
76	        run: |
77	          ls -la $GOCOVERDIR
78	          # pass in all the directories in coverage to be merged
79	          go tool covdata percent -i=$GOCOVERDIR | tee coverage.txt
80	
81	      - name: Upload devserver logs
82	        if: failure()
83	        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
84	        with:
85	          name: devserver-logs-kq-${{ matrix.experimentalKeyQueues }}-api
86	          path: /tmp/devserver-logs-kq-${{ matrix.experimentalKeyQueues }}-api.txt
87	          retention-days: 7
88	
89	      - name: Upload coverage reports to Codecov
90	        uses: codecov/codecov-action@v5
91	        with:
92	          token: ${{ secrets.CODECOV_TOKEN }}
93	          flags: ts-e2e,kq-${{ matrix.experimentalKeyQueues }}
94	
95	  # refs:
96	  #  - https://go.dev/doc/build-cover
97	  golang:
98	    name: "Go SDK / OS: (${{ matrix.os }}), key-queues: ${{ matrix.experimentalKeyQueues }}, db: ${{ matrix.database }} / split: ${{ matrix.index }}"
99	    strategy:
100	      fail-fast: false
101	      matrix:
102	        os: [ubuntu-latest]
103	        experimentalKeyQueues: [false, true]
104	        database: [sqlite, postgres]
105	        parallelism: [5]
106	        index: [0, 1, 2, 3, 4]

name: SDK E2E Tests

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
    paths-ignore:
      - "ui/**"
  pull_request:
    paths-ignore:
      - "ui/**"

permissions:
  contents: read

env:
  GOCOVERDIR: "coverage"

jobs:
  ts:
    name: "TS SDK / OS: (${{ matrix.os }}), key-queues: ${{ matrix.experimentalKeyQueues }}"
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        os: [ubuntu-latest]
        experimentalKeyQueues: [false, true]
    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          submodules: true

      - name: Set up Go
        uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with:
          go-version-file: ./go.mod

      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: "20"

      - name: Install pnpm
        uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
        with:
          version: 10.18.2

      - name: Build UI
        run: make build-ui

      - name: Build dev serve
        run: |
          go build -cover -o ./inngest-bin ./cmd

      - name: Run E2E tests
        run: |
          cd ./tests/js
          pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
          pnpm dev &
          sleep 5
          cd ../../
          echo "Running dev server"
          mkdir $GOCOVERDIR
          nohup ./inngest-bin dev --no-discovery 2> /tmp/devserver-logs-kq-${{ matrix.experimentalKeyQueues }}-api.txt &
          echo "Ran dev server"
          sleep 5
          curl http://127.0.0.1:8288/dev > /dev/null 2> /dev/null
          go test ./tests -v
        env:
          INNGEST_SIGNING_KEY: test
          API_URL: http://127.0.0.1:8288
          SDK_URL: http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/inngest
          TEST_MODE: true
          EXPERIMENTAL_KEY_QUEUES_ENABLE: "${{ matrix.experimentalKeyQueues }}"
          LOG_LEVEL: trace

      - name: Convert coverage for tooling
        run: |
          ls -la $GOCOVERDIR
          # pass in all the directories in coverage to be merged
          go tool covdata percent -i=$GOCOVERDIR | tee coverage.txt

      - name: Upload devserver logs
        if: failure()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: devserver-logs-kq-${{ matrix.experimentalKeyQueues }}-api
          path: /tmp/devserver-logs-kq-${{ matrix.experimentalKeyQueues }}-api.txt
          retention-days: 7

      - name: Upload coverage reports to Codecov
        uses: codecov/codecov-action@v5
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.CODECOV_TOKEN }}
          flags: ts-e2e,kq-${{ matrix.experimentalKeyQueues }}

  # refs:
  #  - https://go.dev/doc/build-cover
  golang:
    name: "Go SDK / OS: (${{ matrix.os }}), key-queues: ${{ matrix.experimentalKeyQueues }}, db: ${{ matrix.database }} / split: ${{ matrix.index }}"
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        os: [ubuntu-latest]
        experimentalKeyQueues: [false, true]
        database: [sqlite, postgres]
        parallelism: [5]
        index: [0, 1, 2, 3, 4]
    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          submodules: true

      - name: Set up Go
        uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with:
          go-version-file: ./go.mod

      - name: Start postgres container
        if: matrix.database == 'postgres'
        run: |
          docker run -d --name inngest-test-postgres \
            -e POSTGRES_USER=postgres \
            -e POSTGRES_PASSWORD=postgres \
            -e POSTGRES_DB=inngest_test \
            -p 5432:5432 \
            postgres:17
          # Wait for postgres to be ready
          for i in $(seq 1 30); do
            if docker exec inngest-test-postgres pg_isready -U postgres > /dev/null 2>&1; then
              echo "Postgres is ready"
              break
            fi
            if [ "$i" = "30" ]; then
              echo "ERROR: Postgres failed to start"
              exit 1
            fi
            sleep 1
          done

      - name: Build dev server
        run: go build -cover -o ./inngest-bin ./cmd

      - name: Install tools
        run: go install tool

      - name: Run E2E tests
        run: |
          echo "Running dev server"
          mkdir $GOCOVERDIR
          if [ "${{ matrix.database }}" = "postgres" ]; then
            nohup ./inngest-bin dev --no-discovery --postgres-uri "postgres://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/inngest_test?sslmode=disable" 2> /tmp/dev-output.txt &
          else
            nohup ./inngest-bin dev --no-discovery 2> /tmp/dev-output.txt &
          fi
          echo "Ran dev server"
          sleep 5
          curl http://127.0.0.1:8288/dev > /dev/null 2> /dev/null

          gotesplit -total ${{ matrix.parallelism }} -index ${{ matrix.index }} ./tests/golang -- -v -count=1
        env:
          API_URL: http://127.0.0.1:8288
          INNGEST_EVENT_KEY: test
          INNGEST_SIGNING_KEY: 7468697320697320612074657374206b6579
          INNGEST_DEV: http://127.0.0.1:8288
          TEST_MODE: true
          TEST_DATABASE: ${{ matrix.database }}
          EXPERIMENTAL_KEY_QUEUES_ENABLE: "${{ matrix.experimentalKeyQueues }}"

      - name: Convert coverage for tooling
        run: |
          ls -la $GOCOVERDIR
          # pass in all the directories in coverage to be merged
          go tool covdata percent -i=$GOCOVERDIR | tee coverage.txt

      - name: Upload devserver logs
        if: failure()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: devserver-logs-golang-kq-${{ matrix.experimentalKeyQueues }}-db-${{ matrix.database }}-split-${{ matrix.index }}
          path: /tmp/dev-output.txt
          retention-days: 7

      - name: Upload coverage reports to Codecov
        uses: codecov/codecov-action@v5
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.CODECOV_TOKEN }}
          flags: go-e2e,split-${{ matrix.index }},kq-${{ matrix.experimentalKeyQueues }},db-${{ matrix.database }}

  api:
    name: "API / OS: (${{ matrix.os }}), key-queues: ${{ matrix.experimentalKeyQueues }}, db: ${{ matrix.database }}"
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        os: [ubuntu-latest]
        experimentalKeyQueues: [false, true]
        database: [sqlite, postgres]
    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          submodules: true

      - name: Set up Go
        uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with:
          go-version-file: ./go.mod

      - name: Start postgres container
        if: matrix.database == 'postgres'
        run: |
          docker run -d --name inngest-test-postgres \
            -e POSTGRES_USER=postgres \
            -e POSTGRES_PASSWORD=postgres \
            -e POSTGRES_DB=inngest_test \
            -p 5432:5432 \
            postgres:17
          # Wait for postgres to be ready
          for i in $(seq 1 30); do
            if docker exec inngest-test-postgres pg_isready -U postgres > /dev/null 2>&1; then
              echo "Postgres is ready"
              break
            fi
            if [ "$i" = "30" ]; then
              echo "ERROR: Postgres failed to start"
              exit 1
            fi
            sleep 1
          done

      - name: Build dev server
        run: go build -cover -o ./inngest-bin ./cmd

      - name: Run API tests
        run: |
          echo "Running dev server"
          mkdir $GOCOVERDIR
          if [ "${{ matrix.database }}" = "postgres" ]; then
            nohup ./inngest-bin dev --no-discovery --postgres-uri "postgres://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/inngest_test?sslmode=disable" 2> /tmp/dev-output.txt &
          else
            nohup ./inngest-bin dev --no-discovery 2> /tmp/dev-output.txt &
          fi
          echo "Ran dev server"
          sleep 5
          curl http://127.0.0.1:8288/dev > /dev/null 2> /dev/null

          go test ./tests/api/... -v -count=1
        env:
          API_URL: http://127.0.0.1:8288
          INNGEST_EVENT_KEY: test
          INNGEST_SIGNING_KEY: 7468697320697320612074657374206b6579
          INNGEST_DEV: http://127.0.0.1:8288
          TEST_MODE: true
          TEST_DATABASE: ${{ matrix.database }}
          EXPERIMENTAL_KEY_QUEUES_ENABLE: "${{ matrix.experimentalKeyQueues }}"

      - name: Convert coverage for tooling
        run: |
          ls -la $GOCOVERDIR
          go tool covdata percent -i=$GOCOVERDIR | tee coverage.txt

      - name: Upload devserver logs
        if: failure()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: devserver-logs-api-kq-${{ matrix.experimentalKeyQueues }}-db-${{ matrix.database }}
          path: /tmp/dev-output.txt
          retention-days: 7

      - name: Upload coverage reports to Codecov
        uses: codecov/codecov-action@v5
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.CODECOV_TOKEN }}
          flags: api-e2e,kq-${{ matrix.experimentalKeyQueues }},db-${{ matrix.database }}

  execution:
    name: "Execution / OS: (${{ matrix.os }}), key-queues: ${{ matrix.experimentalKeyQueues }}"
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        os: [ubuntu-latest]
        experimentalKeyQueues: [false, true]
    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          submodules: true

      - name: Set up Go
        uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with:
          go-version-file: ./go.mod

      - name: Run execution tests
        run: go test ./tests/execution/... -v -count=1 -coverprofile=coverage.txt
        env:
          EXPERIMENTAL_KEY_QUEUES_ENABLE: "${{ matrix.experimentalKeyQueues }}"

      - name: Upload coverage reports to Codecov
        uses: codecov/codecov-action@v5
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.CODECOV_TOKEN }}
          flags: exec,kq-${{ matrix.experimentalKeyQueues }}

FROM ubuntu:24.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install system dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    git \
    curl \
    wget \
    build-essential \
    ca-certificates \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Go 1.24.4
RUN wget -q https://go.dev/dl/go1.24.4.linux-amd64.tar.gz && \
    tar -C /usr/local -xzf go1.24.4.linux-amd64.tar.gz && \
    rm go1.24.4.linux-amd64.tar.gz

ENV PATH="/usr/local/go/bin:$PATH"

WORKDIR /app

# Copy the entire repository
COPY repo/ /app/

# Download dependencies
RUN go mod download

# Install the run script
COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

# Set environment variables
ENV GOCOVERDIR="coverage"
ENV API_URL="http://127.0.0.1:8288"
ENV INNGEST_EVENT_KEY="test"
ENV INNGEST_SIGNING_KEY="7468697320697320612074657374206b6579"
ENV INNGEST_DEV="http://127.0.0.1:8288"
ENV TEST_MODE="true"
ENV TEST_DATABASE="sqlite"
ENV EXPERIMENTAL_KEY_QUEUES_ENABLE="false"

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

FROM ubuntu:24.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install system dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    git \
    curl \
    wget \
    build-essential \
    ca-certificates \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Go 1.24.4
RUN wget -q https://go.dev/dl/go1.24.4.linux-amd64.tar.gz && \
    tar -C /usr/local -xzf go1.24.4.linux-amd64.tar.gz && \
    rm go1.24.4.linux-amd64.tar.gz

ENV PATH="/usr/local/go/bin:$PATH"

WORKDIR /app

# Copy the entire repository
COPY repo/ /app/

# Initialize git submodules
RUN git init && git config user.name "CI" && git config user.email "ci@example.com" && \
    git add . && git commit -m "Initial" --allow-empty && \
    git submodule update --init --recursive || true

# Download dependencies
RUN go mod download

# Install the run script
COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

# Set environment variables
ENV GOCOVERDIR="coverage"
ENV API_URL="http://127.0.0.1:8288"
ENV INNGEST_EVENT_KEY="test"
ENV INNGEST_SIGNING_KEY="7468697320697320612074657374206b6579"
ENV INNGEST_DEV="http://127.0.0.1:8288"
ENV TEST_MODE="true"
ENV TEST_DATABASE="sqlite"
ENV EXPERIMENTAL_KEY_QUEUES_ENABLE="false"

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

echo "Dev server started"

ls -la $GOCOVERDIR
go tool covdata percent -i=$GOCOVERDIR | tee coverage.txt

echo "FINAL_STATUS = SUCCESS"
